name: Velcro Cable Tie
description: You’ve spotted the Velcro Cable Tie, the only thing keeping this workstation from descending into a total 'spaghetti-code' hardware disaster. In the high-speed environment of an FRC pit, these are worth their weight in gold because they allow the electrical team to swap out a faulty motor controller without having to bust out the wire snips and risk a 'Death by Zip-Tie Tail'. This is a Hard find because the matte black fabric is designed to blend perfectly with the cable it’s hugging, creating a seamless silhouette that is easily mistaken for a simple connector or a bit of heat-shrink tubing. It’s a sign of a team that actually values cable management—or at least a team that had five minutes of downtime during the last regional.
